comment.body:
yes, it is always the structure first. positioning is built on the structure.
this is why i keep saying that to be a successfull trader, one doesn't necessary need to have positioning datas.
those are fine and good, but it is not exactly for what people are using it for... it is to derive probability. every other infos can be pulled out of a volume profile as well
